title: New Media and Journalism Program Instructional Objectives
content:
New Media and Journalism Program Instructional Objectives

NEW MEDIA AND JOURNALISM PROGRAM TEACHING OBJECTIVES

PÖA1: To train professionals who can keep up with the digital transformation in the field of media and communication,

PÖA2: To train professionals who can produce and manage digital content and use the interactive and participatory features of new media,

PÖA3: To train professionals who can effectively use the opportunities provided by new media in journalism,

PÖA4: To train professionals with new media literacy qualifications,

PÖA5: To train professionals who act in accordance with professional ethical values,

PÖA6: To train professionals who understand the role of new media and journalism in social development.
